description_long: This is a single-story modern house surrounded by a rectangular yard enclosed with a light-colored fence covered in greenery. The house features a flat, tan roof with subtle decorative trim and a dark facade on the front, contrasted by lighter side and rear walls. The front yard includes a metal gate and fence, with a paved driveway and lush trees flanking the entrance. The backyard contains additional greenery, a small patio area, and what appears to be a covered outdoor structure. Windows and doors are asymmetrically placed, with the main entryway set back under a small overhang. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric lines.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat tan roof, dark front facade, and a fenced yard with trees and a driveway. The design is clean and geometric, with asymmetrical windows and a covered entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main gate, dark facade, entryway, and two large trees flanking the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, light-colored wall, minimal windows, and dense greenery along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio area, covered structure, and a single rear door.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a prominent dark wall, side awning, and additional trees near the fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a single door, small overhang, and flanked by trees and a metal gate
